goal: Complete Phase 4 "Close the Loop" remaining items from cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md: handle blocked tasks in system prompt, handle post-block re-plan guidance, add network-blocking test fixture, add end-to-end mock tests, and mark Phase 4 done.

tasks.name: Update ask.md: blocked task + post-block guidance
tasks.action: Add two missing workflow cases to the system prompt: (1) After calling plan_current, if the returned task has status 'blocked', output the block reason to the user and stop — do NOT attempt to work on a blocked task. (2) After calling plan_block (retries exhausted), output a concise summary of what help is needed from the user so they can create a new plan or unblock manually.
tasks.verify: Read ask.md and confirm it contains explicit handling for both the blocked-task case and the post-plan_block summary case. run_tests passes.
tasks.done: ask.md contains a 'blocked' task branch in the Workflow section and a post-plan_block output instruction.

tasks.name: Add conftest.py with autouse network-blocking fixture
tasks.action: Create a new conftest.py in cluster/agent/claude/ with a session-scoped autouse pytest fixture that patches socket.socket to raise OSError('Network access blocked in tests'). This ensures no test can make a real network call even if env vars point at real services. The fixture must be autouse=True so it applies to all tests automatically without needing @patch decorators.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. Confirm that adding a test that calls requests.get('https://example.com') without a mock raises an error.
tasks.done: conftest.py exists with an autouse socket-blocking fixture; all existing tests still pass.

tasks.name: Add end-to-end mock tests to claude_tests.py
tasks.action: Add two new test functions to claude_tests.py, both patching server.subprocess.run: (1) test_plan_loop_success — mock returns returncode=0 and stdout simulating Claude completing a task (plan_current → work → run_tests pass → git_commit → plan_complete); assert 200 response and no error key. (2) test_plan_loop_block_after_retries — mock returns returncode=0 and stdout simulating Claude hitting 3 test failures then calling plan_block; assert 200 response and no error key. Both tests verify the /ask endpoint passes the SYSTEM_PROMPT to the subprocess (check mock_run.call_args).
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. Both new test functions are collected and pass.
tasks.done: claude_tests.py contains test_plan_loop_success and test_plan_loop_block_after_retries; both pass.

tasks.name: Mark Phase 4 complete in agent PLAN.md
tasks.action: In cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md, change the three remaining unchecked Phase 4 items to checked: '[ ] End-to-end test' → '[X]', '[ ] Handle test failures triggering re-plan or retry' → '[X]', '[ ] Handle blocked tasks' → '[X]'. Also move Phase 5 items into a new '## Phase 5: Hardening' section if not already separated.
tasks.verify: Read cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md and confirm all Phase 4 items are [X]. run_tests passes.
tasks.done: All Phase 4 checkboxes in cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md are marked [X].
